race.comment: MAGARTEN (5) has been desperate to get out to this sort of trip. If Pannell can have him close enough, he will take some stopping. LONGER ROUTE (4) returned to the winner's circle in dominant fashion last time at headquarters. Tougher now but can keep the ball rolling. SAVATOFF (8) is another who will relish the rise in trip. His form over these distances last campaign stack right up and he is worth consideration here. IMPOSING SUSPECT (3) is rock-hard fit and won't give in easily. Worth including in all calculations. SAVSONIC (9) won two starts back at Strathalbyn but couldn't back that up when unplaced over 2250m at this track last time. Hard to leave out on best.
